prose:
Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) using DFT at the tier 'standard' level (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI) in PySCF. The molecule is an open-shell radical treated as an unrestricted Kohn–Sham (UKS) doublet (charge 0, multiplicity 2) in the gas phase. Geometry was taken directly from the user-supplied tempo.xyz (single-point; geometry not re-optimized at DFT). The SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings were reported (clean run). Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Results:
- HOMO (index 86, SOMO): −6.3375439 eV
- LUMO (index 87): −2.4651235 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 3.8724203 eV  ← headline value
- Total energy: −483.88366 Eh / −13167.145 eV

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3375 eV, vertical EA = 2.4651 eV, chemical hardness = 1.9362 eV, electrophilicity index = 5.0025 eV.

No warnings were reported by the engine (empty warnings array — clean run).

Method string: UKS B3LYP/def2-TZVP // user-supplied geometry, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2, single-point (provenance: computed).
